keys.description: Fallback currency when tenant's home Region has none set.
Retry attempt intervals (in days). Position 0 = day+N for attempt 2; position 1 = day+N for attempt 3; position 2 = day+N for attempt 4. After attempt 4, membership lapses.
Number of retry attempts after the initial failed attempt. Reaching this + all failing lapses the membership.
Max memberships processed per hourly ProcessMembershipRenewalJob run.
Additional grace days between the 4th failed attempt and the lapse transition. Allows customer to update payment method after seeing final dunning email.

When true, coupons that were used at signing may re-apply to renewals (subject to coupon.applies_to_renewals + coupon.max_redemptions_per_customer). When false, each renewal is billed at plan price + tax without coupon.
Fallback policy when plan.passes_carry_over is null (should never happen — schema defaults to false).
Days before valid_until to fire PassExpiring notification. 0 disables.
Max passes processed per ExpireStalePassesJob run.
Default cancellation_kind when endpoint body omits it. soft_period_end = no refund, ends at period boundary; hard_immediate = immediate termination + prorated refund (Enterprise-only).
Minimum length for cancellation_reason. Anti-anonymous cancel.
Hours after MembershipCreated during which the customer can hard-cancel without admin approval (regardless of entitlement) — 'buyer's remorse' window.
Standard retention window past terminal transition.
Extended retention window applied when tenant holds `membership_extended_retention` entitlement.
Attempt number at which SMS channel is added to dunning (email is default at every attempt). SMS is transactional_required — customer cannot opt out during active dunning.
